title: MapleStory: Idle RPG Summertime Surprise Coupon Gift
author: MapleStory: Idle RPG
summary: Nexon's official Summertime Surprise notice published the COOLSUMMER coupon for MapleStory: Idle RPG. The coupon expired on July 1, 2026 at 14:59 UTC; the article preserves the official Android and iOS redemption routes, account-mailbox delivery, and one-use-per-account cautions without presenting the expired code as active.

sections.title: Coupon status
items: The official coupon code was COOLSUMMER.
The official expiration was July 1, 2026 at 14:59 UTC.
The coupon is retained as historical coverage and is not presented as currently active.

sections.title: Official redemption routes
items: Android players could use Menu, Settings, Other, and Enter Coupon in the game.
The official coupon page supported both iOS and Android.
Successful rewards were delivered to the account mailbox.

sections.title: Account safety
items: The coupon was limited to one use per account.
Players were instructed to confirm the correct character and UID before redemption.
The official notice warned that successfully redeemed rewards could not be restored or transferred to another character.

notes: Original MPStorys summary and structured facts verified against Nexon's official coupon notice on 2026-07-24. No full source text is stored.
